hero.headline: Professional nano filtration for food industry
hero.subheadline: We filter vegetable oils, coffee and cosmetics. First manufacturer in the Czech Republic using nanofibers for filtration.

about.title: Who we are
about.description: Filtrex s.r.o. is a Czech manufacturer of industrial plate filters and nanofiber filtration membranes. Our technology ensures high purity of filtered liquids in food industry, cosmetics and pharmaceuticals.

references.title: Our customers
references.subtitle: Our filtration is used by manufacturers in 5 countries
